list_markets.description: List active PT/YT markets across chains via /v2/markets/all, sorted by implied APY (fixedApy proxy).
list_markets.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.pendle_adapter import PendleAdapter

adapter = PendleAdapter()

rows = await adapter.list_active_pt_yt_markets(
    chains=["arbitrum", "base", "hyperevm"],
    min_liquidity_usd=250_000,
    min_volume_usd_24h=25_000,
    min_days_to_expiry=7,
    sort_by="fixed_apy",
    descending=True,
)

for row in rows[:3]:
    print(row["marketName"], f"{row['fixedApy'] * 100:.2f}%", row["expiry"])

stablecoin_markets.description: Find active stablecoin PT markets on Arbitrum and display fixed APY as percent.
stablecoin_markets.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.pendle_adapter import PendleAdapter

adapter = PendleAdapter()

rows = await adapter.list_active_pt_yt_markets(
    chains=["arbitrum"],
    min_liquidity_usd=250_000,
    min_days_to_expiry=7,
    sort_by="fixed_apy",
    descending=True,
)

stable_rows = [
    row
    for row in rows
    if any(symbol in row["marketName"].upper() for symbol in ["USD", "DAI", "USDE"])
]

for row in stable_rows[:5]:
    print(row["marketName"], f"{row['fixedApy'] * 100:.2f}%", row["marketAddress"], row["ptAddress"])

best_pt_swap.description: Build a Hosted-SDK swap payload (tx + approvals) for the best PT on a chain.
best_pt_swap.code:
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.pendle_adapter import PendleAdapter

adapter = PendleAdapter()

best = await adapter.build_best_pt_swap_tx(
    chain="arbitrum",
    token_in="0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831",
    amount_in=str(1000 * 10**6),
    receiver="0xYourEOAHere",
    slippage=0.01,
    enable_aggregator=True,
    max_markets_to_quote=10,
)

if best["ok"]:
    print(best["selectedMarket"], best["quote"])
    print(best["tx"], best["tokenApprovals"])

fill_taker_limit_order.description: Fetch one signed Pendle taker limit order and fill it through LimitRouter with a 1% maxTaking buffer.
fill_taker_limit_order.code:
from wayfinder_paths.mcp.scripting import get_adapter
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.pendle_adapter import PendleAdapter

adapter = await get_adapter(PendleAdapter, "main")

page = await adapter.fetch_taker_limit_orders(
    chain="arbitrum",
    yt="0xYourYTHere",
    order_type="TOKEN_FOR_PT",
    limit=1,
)

ok, result = await adapter.execute_taker_limit_order_fill(
    chain="arbitrum",
    limit_order_items=page["results"][0],
    max_taking_bps=100,
)
print(ok, result)

create_maker_limit_order.description: Generate, sign, and post a Pendle maker limit order. Requires live-chain maker balance and allowance.
create_maker_limit_order.code:
from wayfinder_paths.mcp.scripting import get_adapter
from wayfinder_paths.adapters.pendle_adapter import PendleAdapter

adapter = await get_adapter(PendleAdapter, "main")

ok, result = await adapter.create_maker_limit_order(
    chain="arbitrum",
    yt="0xYourYTHere",
    order_type="TOKEN_FOR_PT",
    token="0xaf88d065e77c8cC2239327C5EDb3A432268e5831",
    making_amount=str(100 * 10**6),
    implied_apy=0.10,
    expiry=str(1_893_456_000),
)
print(ok, result)
